name: create_equity_order
description: Create a buy or sell order for an equity (stock/ETF) in the Criteria OMS. Returns the created order ID.

broker.description: Broker platform: 'pershing' or 'xp' for XP accounts, 'criteria.uy' or 'cuy' for CUY accounts, 'intl_fcs' or 'stonex' for StoneX accounts

customer_account.description: Client account number (from CRM, same value goes in Customer and Account fields)

symbol.description: Ticker symbol, e.g. SPY, AAPL, GLD

quantity.description: Number of shares or dollar amount

limit_price.description: Limit price (only if order_type is limit)

time_frame.description: Time frame: day (default), gtc, or gtd

commission_type.description: Commission type: 'cash' for fixed USD amount, 'percentage' for % of notional value

commission_value.description: Commission amount: USD if commission_type=cash, or percentage like 0.5 for 0.5% if commission_type=percentage

notional_usd.description: Estimated notional value in USD — required for market orders with percentage commission so the USD 100 minimum can be enforced

skip_minimum.description: Set to true ONLY when explicitly told not to apply the USD 100 minimum commission. Default is false (minimum always applies).

notes.description: Full asset name to put in the Notes field, e.g. 'SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust'

name: create_mutual_fund_order
description: Create a buy or sell order for a mutual fund in the Criteria OMS. For sells, quantity can be provided as shares or converted from USD amount. Commission minimum is USD 100.

cusip.description: CUSIP or ISIN of the mutual fund

quantity_type.description: For buys: 'dollars' if providing USD amount, 'shares' if providing units. For sells: always 'shares'.

quantity.description: Amount in USD (if quantity_type=dollars) or number of shares/units

last_price.description: Latest NAV price per share — required when selling by USD amount so shares can be calculated (shares = amount / last_price, rounded UP to 2 decimals)

full_liquidation.description: Set to true when selling ALL shares of this fund (full liquidation). Do NOT set for partial sells.

fee_pct.description: Commission: percentage (e.g. 0.75 for 0.75%) or fixed USD amount if commission_type=cash. Minimum USD 100 enforced automatically.

commission_type.description: 'percentage' = fee_pct is a %, 'cash' = fee_pct is a fixed USD amount

fee_inclusion.description: 'added' = fee added ON TOP of amount (default), 'included' = fee included within the amount

amount_usd_for_fee.description: USD notional to calculate fee from when quantity_type=shares. Also used for minimum enforcement.

skip_minimum.description: Set to true ONLY when explicitly told not to apply the USD 100 minimum. Default is false.

notes.description: Full fund name for the Notes field

name: create_bond_order
description: Create a buy or sell order for a bond in the Criteria OMS. Uses % Principal markup type.

markup_pct.description: Markup/commission percentage. Uses % Principal (on traded value). Minimum USD 100 equivalent enforced.

skip_minimum.description: Set to true ONLY when explicitly told not to apply the USD 100 minimum. Default is false.

notes.description: Full bond name/description for the Notes field

name: get_brokers
description: Get the list of available brokers from the OMS

name: get_advisors
description: Get the list of available advisors from the OMS

name: get_orders
description: Get current orders list from the OMS for the default advisor (asng)

name: oms_login
description: Explicitly login to the OMS and establish a socket connection. Called automatically by other tools, but can be called manually to test connectivity.
